input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.6.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.6.3
            TITLE: all fuel vent lines must exit outside the bodywork.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.6.3: All fuel vent lines must exit outside the bodywork.
IC.5.6.3 All fuel vent lines must exit outside the bodywork.

final_answer: All fuel vent lines must exit outside the bodywork.
